title: Vegan Hostile Mob Drops
description: Vegan recipes replacing hostile mob drops for those who play in peaceful mode
body:
No hostile mobs? No problem! Craft froglights, blaze rods, spider eyes, shulker shells and more using vegan base ingredients. 

Includes recipes for the following:

- Slime blocks
- String
- Spider eyes
- Rotten flesh
- Ender pearls
- Blaze rods
- Gunpowder
- Ghast tears
- Froglights (all colors)
- Phantom membranes
- Shulker shells
- Nether stars
- Bones (from bone meal obtained from a composter)
- Prismarine shards
- Tridents
- Totems of Undying
- Sponges
- Dragon breath
- Breeze rods (1.21+)
- Heavy core (1.21+)
- Resin clumps (1.21.4+)

Plus recipes for the base ingredients that aren't vegan, like honeycomb, rabbit hide, honey bottles and feathers.

Also check out [Vegan Mob Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vegan-mob-drops), for those who don't want to kill passive mobs.
